subject: Master Shen (Dragon Ball Super) — tall lean male-presenting figure with a distinctive topknot hairstyle in a martial arts uniform, looking down with a contemptuous expression
description: A tall lean male-presenting figure in a martial arts uniform with a distinctive high topknot hairstyle stands looking downward with a contemptuous, self-satisfied expression. The figure appears older, with a thin face. The background suggests an outdoor tournament setting with blue sky. The composition is a mid-shot framing the figure from the waist up at a slight upward angle reinforcing the figure's looking-down posture.
foreground: tall lean older martial arts master with topknot, contemptuous downward gaze
